---
pagetitle: "Portfolio"
description: "Data Science & Marketing Analytics projects"
title-block-style: none
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
body-classes: home
---
::: column-screen
::: hero-banner
::: hero-title
Portfolio
:::
::: hero-subtitle
Data Science & Marketing Analytics projects: code, methods, and interactive applications.
:::
:::
:::

## Categories
::: column-page
:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-4
### Data Analysis

Exploration, visualisation and business insights from marketing and e-commerce data.

[See Analysis projects →](/portfolio/analysis/index.en.html)
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### Machine Learning

Predictive models, causal inference and reinforcement learning applied to concrete use cases.

[See ML projects →](/portfolio/ml/index.en.html)
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### Visualisation

Interactive dashboards and data visualisations for decision-making.

[See visualisations →](/portfolio/viz/index.en.html)
:::
::::::
:::
------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Featured projects
::: column-screen
::::::: grid
:::: g-col-md-6
::: portfolio-item
### Marketing Mix Modeling (Robyn)

**Is your marketing budget well allocated?** This model measures the real impact of each channel and identifies reallocations that improve ROI, distinguishing the causal effect of campaigns from statistical noise and underlying trend.

Using Meta's Robyn framework for sales decomposition and marketing budget optimisation.

**Technologies:** R, Robyn, Prophet, Shiny

[See project →](/portfolio/analysis/mmm-robyn.en.html) \| [Shiny Dashboard](https://arnaudraulet.shinyapps.io/mmm-robyn/){target="_blank"}
:::
::::

:::: g-col-md-6
::: portfolio-item
### Causal Inference Platform

**Did your campaign actually generate sales?** This platform distinguishes the real effect of a commercial action from statistical noise, so you can measure what works before scaling it.

Complete A/B testing platform with Bayesian analysis and Causal ML for treatment effect measurement.

**Technologies:** Python, PyMC, CausalML, FastAPI, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/ml/causal-inference.en.html) \| [Streamlit Dashboard](https://causal-inference-platform.streamlit.app/){target="_blank"}
:::
::::
:::::::

::::::: grid
:::: g-col-md-6
::: portfolio-item
### Marketing Analytics Pipeline

**Are your marketing KPIs reliable and up to date?** This pipeline automates the collection, processing and visualisation of marketing data, with a reproducible and maintainable architecture.

Complete ETL pipeline with BigQuery, dbt and real-time KPI dashboard.

**Technologies:** Python, BigQuery, dbt, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/analysis/marketing-pipeline.en.html) \| [Streamlit Dashboard](https://marketing-data-pipeline-demo.streamlit.app){target="_blank"}
:::
::::

:::: g-col-md-6
::: portfolio-item
### Dynamic Pricing Engine

**Do your prices react to demand?** This engine optimises prices in real time according to market conditions, progressing from classical econometrics to reinforcement learning.

**Technologies:** Python, PyMC, Q-Learning, Streamlit

[See project →](/portfolio/ml/dynamic-pricing.en.html)
:::
::::
:::::::
:::
------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact-section
## A similar challenge in your business?

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary} [See my services →](/services/index.en.html){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
